title: Warm Spiced Egyptian Dum Tagine
description: A light and citrusy Egyptian dish featuring chicken stock concentrate and dum, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and easily made plant-based-friendly by substituting the chicken stock concentrate with a vegetable stock concentrate.

ingredients.name: dum
ingredients.notes: or substitute with similar dried fruit

ingredients.name: chicken stock concentrate
ingredients.notes: or vegetable stock concentrate for plant-based

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the cumin, coriander, and cinnamon and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the dum, chicken stock concentrate, and lemon juice, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes, or until the dum is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
